title: micromeria forbesii var. altitudinum
intro: Micromeria forbesii var. altitudinum, a rare and lesser-known variant of the Micromeria forbesii plant, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Micromeria forbesii var. altitudinum are said to include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a component in traditional herbal remedies.
